creator: smars@yuntech.edu.tw
text:
Installation of octave-forge-ltfat failed
I tried to install it from port and from a poudriere generated package (using two different computers, both amd64) but the installation fail. After a few minutes, I get:
"panic: Bus error -- stopping myself..."
After a few more minute, it returns to the prompt and the package is not properly installed.

[version: octave-forge-ltfat-2.0.1]

(other octave-forge packages have no problems)

OS: FreeBSD **** 10.1-RELEASE-p8 FreeBSD 10.1-RELEASE-p8 #0 r280800: Sun Mar 29 12:01:46 CST 2015     toor@***:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/BSD_PIERRE  amd64
